input.message: Hi, I was charged twice for my subscription this month. My account is ari@example.com. Please look into it.
I bought a year of Pro yesterday by mistake, I meant to buy Basic. Can I get a refund?
Your app has been crashing for me three days in a row now. I'm losing work and patience. This is unacceptable.
Is the service down? I cannot reach the dashboard at all from any device since about 14:00 UTC.
Would love to see a dark mode toggle and an export-to-CSV option in the reports section. Any plans for that?
How do I add a teammate to my workspace? I can't find the option anywhere.
I can't log in — the password reset email isn't arriving even after 4 tries. Email is ari@example.com.
Hei, laskullani on virheellinen summa: tällä kuulla minulta on veloitettu 49 euroa, mutta sopimuksessani on 29 euroa kuukaudessa. Voitteko korjata?
I was charged for a feature I never used and on top of that the app crashes every time I try to open it. I want a refund AND I want this fixed.
Hey, just wanted to say I really enjoy your product. Keep up the good work!
